form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 43 day let-up. Last start favourite; scored a big 11 len win at this track February 28 over 1200m defeating Global Serve carrying 56.5kg at $2.10. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at this track on January 11 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Carolchat with 56kg at $2.20. Chances enhanced by drawing a nice marble.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a neck at this track March 14 over 1200m defeating Raon Final with 57kg at $2.20. The start before that favourite; won by 1.0 len at this track February 15 over 1200m defeating Good Morning Come carrying 52.5kg at $6.10. Definite chance.
